title: chrysopsis hispida
intro: Chrysopsis hispida, also known as the hairy goldeneye, is a flowering plant native to the eastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Chrysopsis hispida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
